package handler

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"strconv"
)

// Positive scenario for gin_handler_parses_config_or_feature_flags_inline
// Rule intent: Handlers that read feature flags, tenant configuration, or rollout toggles
// directly instead of using injected policy/config abstractions.
func PositiveGinHandlerParsesConfigOrFeatureFlagsInline(c *gin.Context) {
	featureFlag := os.Getenv("FEATURE_FLAG")
	maxItems := os.Getenv("MAX_ITEMS")
	debugMode := os.Getenv("DEBUG_MODE")

	limit := 100
	if maxItems != "" {
		if parsed, err := strconv.Atoi(maxItems); err == nil {
			limit = parsed
		}
	}

	if featureFlag == "enabled" && debugMode == "true" {
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{
			"data":      []string{},
			"limit":     limit,
			"debug":     true,
			"flag":      featureFlag,
		})
		return
	}

	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"data": []string{}, "limit": limit})
}
